questions.q: The term used to measure the ability of a person to perform physical work is:
The formula to calculate the body mass index (BMI) is:
questions.answer: BMI = weight in kg / (height in meters)²

questions.q: Which of the following is a criterion for the selection of a test in sports?
The process of making the subject unaware of the fact that he is being tested is known as:
The term used to measure the level of strength of a muscle is:
Test and measurement in sports are done for:
questions.answer: To evaluate the performance of an athlete, to identify the areas of improvement, to select the best athlete, and to develop a training programme.

questions.q: The advantages of using objective tests in sports are:
questions.answer: They are free from personal bias, they are easy to score, they are quick to administer, they are valid, and they are reliable.
